overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The player traverses elevated walkways, descends to street level via ramps, and explores narrow alleys with vibrant holographic advertisements and wet reflective surfaces.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated walkway passing benches and modern street lamps

large vertical screen displaying animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide elevated pedestrian walkway at night, illuminated by tall street lamps. A concrete bench with seated figures sits to the left while futuristic skyscrapers rise in the background. The player walks forward along the geometric tiled path.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian bridge with descending ramp to lower level

beginning descent down concrete ramp into lower city level

agents.ego_description: walking down ramp into lower city level, approaching street level

entered.detail: concrete and metal overhead passageway with orange accent lighting
concrete ramp with metal handrails leading downward

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered bridge structure and begins descending a concrete ramp. The environment becomes more enclosed as the camera moves downward toward the lower city level, with the skyscraper building now appearing closer on the left.

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the bottom of the ramp and enters a narrow alley with wet asphalt reflecting vibrant purple neon from a food stall. The environment is enclosed by high walls with japanese lanterns and palm trees in planters lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with holographic advertisements and storefronts

events.description: passing row of palm trees in yellow planters along the right side

agents.ego_description: walking past various neon signs and storefronts in the narrow corridor

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: large digital advertisement display showing animated product content
small kiosk structure with glowing interior display
opening to larger covered area with industrial architecture

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the narrow alley, the player passes holographic billboards and green neon signs. Palm trees line the right side while the path leads toward a covered plaza entrance visible in the distance. The wet pavement continues to reflect the vibrant artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered transit plaza with industrial ceiling and food vendors

approaching food vendor area with multiple people gathered near counter

agents.ego_description: walking into covered plaza area passing by shops and food vendors

person sitting on the ground near wall with belongings

entered.detail: exposed metal beams ventilation ducts and hanging fluorescent lights
bright red and blue neon sign reading OPEN above doorway

metal safety barrier along the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player enters a spacious covered plaza with a high industrial ceiling featuring exposed ductwork and beams. A bright neon OPEN sign marks a food vendor stall on the right where people are gathered. The environment shifts from the narrow alley to this more open indoor space with concrete flooring.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an open, elevated pedestrian walkway down into the neon-drenched depths of a futuristic city plaza. It begins on a wide, tiled path illuminated by tall street lamps and flanked by skyscrapers, moving forward past concrete benches before entering a covered bridge. As the camera descends a concrete ramp, the environment becomes increasingly enclosed, shifting from the heights of the city toward the street level. The scene then transitions into a narrow alley where wet asphalt reflects vibrant purple neon and holographic billboards, with Japanese lanterns and palm trees lining the high walls. Finally, the path opens up as the camera leaves the alley and enters a spacious covered plaza characterized by an industrial ceiling and a bright neon food vendor stall.
